notes: Source material (TCRF) provides only development history, localization notes, and debug information. No visual design documentation, danger/safety signal descriptions, faction visual identifiers, world-state manifestations, or environmental storytelling techniques are documented in available sources. Game is a localized remake of Hiryuu no Ken II incorporating mechanics from Hiryuu no Ken III, with Americanized superhero transformation designs replacing original Japanese martial arts aesthetics. No gameplay screenshots, level design analysis, or visual communication systems are detailed in source material.
sources_used: tcrf - Flying Warriors - The Cutting Room Floor
